name: US FLOUR
description: US FLOUR is a leading bulk flour supplier that specializes in wheat products, offering a variety of high-quality options including whole wheat, white whole wheat, vital wheat gluten, and all-purpose flour. With over 100 years of experience, US FLOUR ensures consistent supply and expedited deliveries, making it a reliable source for bakers and food manufacturers.

name: Grain Millers Inc.
description: Grain Millers is a supplier of whole white wheat flour, which is commonly used in baking cookies, muffins, quick bread, and brownies. Their commitment to providing high-quality ingredients supports healthier eating habits.

name: Ardent Mills
description: The company, Horizon Milling, introduces WheatSelect® white spring whole wheat flour, which helps manufacturers incorporate whole wheat nutrition into their products. Additionally, their commitment to sustainability and high-quality ingredients underscores their focus on innovative milling practices.

name: Wilmar International
description: The company is a comprehensive supplier of agricultural inputs, including flour, which is available in various packaging sizes and in bulk.

name: PT Indofood Sukses Makmur Tbk
description: PT Indofood Sukses Makmur Tbk. is a prominent producer of wheat flour through its Bogasari division, which specializes in flour and pasta manufacturing.

name: Allied Pinnacle
description: The company is a leading manufacturer and supplier of flour, highlighting its expertise in premium plain flour.

name: Archer Daniels Midland Company
description: ADM offers a range of flours and specialty grains designed to enhance baking performance and ensure consistent results, making them a key player in the food industry. Their commitment to sustainable sourcing further underscores their role in providing quality ingredients.

name: Moderna Alimentos S.A
description: Moderna Alimentos is a prominent food company in Ecuador's milling industry, specializing in high-quality wheat-based products. They offer a diverse range of industrial and consumer flours, highlighting their expertise and commitment to innovation and sustainability.

name: PT Cerestar Flour Mills Group
description: Cerestar produces a wide range of quality wheat flour, ensuring consistent results for various food applications like noodles, biscuits, breads, and cakes.

name: Boom Plus For Manufacturing and Commerce
description: Boom Plus For Manufacturing and Commerce offers a variety of high-quality wheat flour products, including different brands and packaging sizes, catering to grocery stores and supermarkets. Their wheat flour is recognized for its reliability and competitive pricing, making it a prominent choice in the market.
